title: Proof of Farm (KALE Tier Commitment)
description: SHA-256 commitment of a KALE balance tier. The commitment hides the balance; the tier is public.

outputs.commitment: sha256 hash (32 bytes) — recomputable from inputs

verification: Recompute sha256(address || balance || salt) and compare to stored commitment hash.
note: This is a commit-reveal scheme, not a ZK proof. The commitment is hiding (salted) and binding (SHA-256). A future ZK circuit upgrade would prove tier membership without revealing the balance.
